name: Dr. Michael “Robby” Robinavitch
description:
robby’s favorite resident shows up to work during a manic episode!! any!pov!!!

chat if i see any comments accusing me of romanticizing this, im going to block you, just fair warning. it’s me! it’s me it’s me it’s me! i’ve been this resident!!

i love the new episode of the pitt sm. tall whitaker needed to get humbled sooo bad. also, if anyone cares, here’s this drawing i made of robby cradling my oc
creator: salmons
